description: To amend the description of development to capture the heat pump as previously approved.
reason:
The approved application included provision for an air source heat pump shown on the submitted drawings; however, it was not explicitly referenced within the description of development.

Following discussions with the case officer, it is understood that an amendment to the approved description is required to enable the proposed relocation of the heat pump to be considered through a separate Section 73 (variation of condition) application.

This Non-Material Amendment is therefore sought solely to update the description of development to accurately reflect the approved drawings and facilitate the validation and determination of the subsequent application.
